sections.subtitle: Recent Form Analysis
sections.text: RC Sporting Charleroi has shown mixed results in their last 5 matches, with 3 wins and 2 losses, scoring 10 goals. KV Mechelen, on the other hand, remains unbeaten in their last 3 matches, with 1 win and 2 draws, scoring 6 goals. Charleroi's home form looks stronger, while Mechelen's away performances have been inconsistent.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two encounters, the teams have split results with one draw (1-1) and one win for Charleroi (3-0). Matches between these sides often see both teams scoring, with an average of 3 goals per game in recent head-to-heads.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Both teams have scored 12 goals this season, ranking mid-table in attack, but Charleroi has a slight defensive edge with 10 goals conceded compared to Mechelen's 8. Charleroi also excels in duels and interceptions, suggesting they might dominate physically at home.

sections.subtitle: Key Trends
sections.text: Charleroi often scores first and wins the first half, as seen in 4 of their last 5 matches. Mechelen tends to have high corner counts on the road (often over 10.5), while both teams scoring is a recurring theme in 4 of their last 5 games combined.
